text: Iran does not currently plan to participate in further talks with Washington, state TV reports.
text_zh: 据伊朗国家电视台报道，伊朗目前没有计划与华盛顿进行进一步会谈。

text: WarMonitor North Korea fired more ballistic missiles about 140 km into the sea today, its 4th launch this month alone. Reports say Godzilla once again managed to outmaneuver them. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045953682231943650/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：朝鲜今天向海中发射了多枚弹道导弹，飞行距离约140公里，这是本月以来的第四次发射。有报道称哥斯拉再次成功避开了它们。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045953682231943650/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Photo currently circulating on social media which appears to show a soldier with the Israel Defense Force striking and destroying a statue of Jesus Christ on the cross using a sledgehammer during recent operations in the Christian town of Debel in Southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045951769692213729/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：社交媒体上流传的一张照片显示，在黎巴嫩南部基督教城镇德贝尔（Debel）最近的行动中，一名以色列国防军士兵用大锤击毁了一座十字架上的耶稣基督雕像。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045951769692213729/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor The president is lashing out and threatening war crimes again after Iran rejected his deal, the same one he was claiming was basically done just days ago. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045951128240570423/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：在伊朗拒绝了他的协议后，总统再次抨击并威胁要发动战争罪行，而就在几天前，他还声称该协议基本已经达成。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045951128240570423/photo/1 推文

text: UAE commentator Abdulkhaleq Abdulla: It is time to think about closing the American bases, as they are a burden and not a strategic asset.
text_zh: 阿联酋评论员阿卜杜勒哈利克·阿卜杜拉（Abdulkhaleq Abdulla）：现在是考虑关闭美国基地的时候了，因为它们是负担，而不是战略资产。

text: Nuno Felix RT @Levant_24_ : European Deputy Minister for European Affairs Marilena Raouna said the European Union has invited President Ahmad al-Sharaa to attend the European Council summit set to be held next week in Cyprus. https://twitter.com/Levant_24_/status/2045938520670310501/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @Levant_24_：欧洲欧洲事务副部长玛丽莲娜·劳娜（Marilena Raouna）表示，欧盟已邀请艾哈迈德·沙拉（Ahmad al-Sharaa）总统出席定于下周在塞浦路斯举行的欧洲理事会峰会。https://twitter.com/Levant_24_/status/2045938520670310501/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to U.S. President Donald J. Trump, the Iranian cargo vessel, the TOUSKA, attempted to run the U.S. blockade of vessels originating from Iranian ports and offshore berthing areas and was intercepted by the USS Spruance (DDG-111) and given repeated warning to turn around. After failing to heed these warnings, the Spruance targeted the engine room of the vessel and the vessel was subsequently boarded by the U.S. Marines. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普称，伊朗货船“TOUSKA”号试图突破美国对源自伊朗港口和海上停泊区船只的封锁，被斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰（USS Spruance, DDG-111）拦截，并多次收到转向警告。在未能理会这些警告后，斯普鲁恩斯号瞄准了该船的机舱，随后美国海军陆战队登上了该船。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @RapidResponse47 : https://twitter.com/RapidResponse47/status/2045946573033468351/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转发 @RapidResponse47：https://twitter.com/RapidResponse47/status/2045946573033468351/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Donald Trump said the U.S. Navy destroyer USS Spruance (DDG-111) intercepted the Iranian-flagged vessel TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and that the ship is now in U.S. custody. BREAKING: 🔴 U.S. President Donald Trump: "Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!" - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰（DDG-111）在阿曼湾拦截了悬挂伊朗国旗的“TOUSKA”号货船，目前该船已被美国扣押。突发：🔴 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“今天，一艘悬挂伊朗国旗、长近900英尺、重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰的货船‘TOUSKA’号试图突破我们的海军封锁，但结果对他们来说并不好。美国海军导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号在阿曼湾拦截了‘TOUSKA’号，并向他们发出了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，所以我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。由于其以往的非法活动历史，‘TOUSKA’号受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，并正在查看船上的货物！” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #BREAKING ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ U.S. President Donald Trump stated that U.S. naval forces struck and stopped an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel in the Gulf of Oman after it ignored warnings: 📌 “Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named ‘TOUSKA,’ nearly 900 feet long (about 275 meters), attempted to breach our naval blockade — it ended badly for them.” 📌 “The U.S. Navy destroyer USS Spruance intercepted TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman and issued a lawful warning to stop. The crew ignored it, so we disabled the vessel by striking its engine section. U.S. Marines now fully control the ship.” 📌 “TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury sanctions due to prior illegal activity. The vessel is now in our possession, and we are determining what is on board,” Trump said. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：#突发 ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，美国海军部队在阿曼湾拦截并阻止了一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的货船，此前该船无视警告：📌 “今天，一艘悬挂伊朗国旗、长近900英尺（约275米）的货船‘TOUSKA’号试图突破我们的海军封锁——这对他们来说结局很糟糕。” 📌 “美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰在阿曼湾拦截了‘TOUSKA’号，并发布了合法的停止警告。船员无视了警告，所以我们通过打击其发动机舱使该船瘫痪。美国海军陆战队现在完全控制了该船。” 📌 “由于以往的非法活动，‘TOUSKA’号受到美国财政部的制裁。该船现在由我们控制，我们正在确定船上的货物，”特朗普说。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Instant News Alerts #BREAKING : US Navy assets "blew a hole in the engine room" and seized an Iranian-flagged cargo ship attempting to pass the US blockade https://twitter.com/InstaNewsAlerts/status/2045949960491876479/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Instant News Alerts：#突发：美国海军资产“炸毁了机舱”，并扣押了一艘试图通过美国封锁线的悬挂伊朗国旗的货船 https://twitter.com/InstaNewsAlerts/status/2045949960491876479/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING: 🔴 U.S. President Donald Trump: "Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!" tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：突发：🔴 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“今天，一艘悬挂伊朗国旗、长近900英尺、重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰的货船‘TOUSKA’号试图突破我们的海军封锁，但结果对他们来说并不好。美国海军导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号在阿曼湾拦截了‘TOUSKA’号，并向他们发出了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，所以我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。由于其以往的非法活动历史，‘TOUSKA’号受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，并正在查看船上的货物！” 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Donald Trump says an Iranian cargo ship was struck and boarded: “Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, attempted to breach our naval blockade — and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy guided missile destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman and issued a fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to comply, after which our Navy ship stopped them in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engine room. U.S. Marines now have control of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury sanctions due to its prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship and are inspecting what’s on board.” See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 突发 | 唐纳德·特朗普称一艘伊朗货船被击中并被登船检查：“今天，一艘悬挂伊朗国旗、长近900英尺、重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰的货船‘TOUSKA’号试图突破我们的海军封锁——这对他们来说结局很糟糕。美国海军导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号在阿曼湾拦截了‘TOUSKA’号，并发布了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝配合，随后我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。美国海军陆战队现在控制了该船。由于其以往的非法活动历史，‘TOUSKA’号受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，并正在检查船上的货物。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran says it is fully prepared for a possible resumption of war, pointing to recent U.S. military movements — including naval redeployments, an unprecedented airlift of equipment, and intensified reconnaissance drone activity over Iranian islands. 🟥 Tehran is considering two main scenarios: U.S. maneuvers are psychological pressure aimed at gaining leverage in negotiations. They represent preparations for a sudden strike — noting that Washington has already carried out strikes during the current negotiation process. 🔹 Iran says it has reorganized and prepared its forces over the past two weeks, warning that any renewed conflict would create “unforgettable hellish hours” from the outset. 📌 According to Tasnim, citing IRGC officials: ▪️ If war resumes and Iranian infrastructure is targeted again, Tehran threatens to abandon its previous restraint and expand the conflict zone. ▪️ Potential targets could include the Bab el-Mandeb Strait, Saudi Aramco facilities, and strategic ports and oil terminals in Saudi Arabia and the UAE, such as Yanbu and Fujairah. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗表示已为可能恢复的战争做好充分准备，并指出美国近期的军事行动——包括海军重新部署、前所未有的装备空运，以及在伊朗岛屿上空加强的侦察无人机活动。 🟥 德黑兰正在考虑两种主要方案：美国的演习是旨在在谈判中获得筹码的心理压力。它们代表了突然袭击的准备——并指出华盛顿在当前的谈判过程中已经进行了打击。 🔹 伊朗表示，过去两周已重组并准备了其部队，警告称任何冲突的重燃都将从一开始就制造“令人难忘的地狱时刻”。 📌 据塔斯尼姆通讯社援引伊斯兰革命卫队官员的话：▪️ 如果战争重燃且伊朗基础设施再次成为目标，德黑兰威胁要放弃此前的克制并扩大冲突区域。▪️ 潜在目标可能包括曼德海峡、沙特阿美设施，以及沙特和阿联酋的战略港口和石油码头，如延布和富查伊拉。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says that U.S. Marines intercepted and have custody of Iranian-flagged cargo ship, TOUSKA, that ignored warnings and tried to get past the Naval Blockade:" We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!" tweet

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : Not a great sign when someone needs a full weeklong event just to convince people they’re a Christian. Trump will take part in a weeklong public reading of the Bible in Washington, D.C., organized by conservative Christian leaders. Source: NYT https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2045615778452459918/photo/1 - Clash Report tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转发 @TheWarMonitor：当一个人需要举办为期一周的活动才能让人们相信他是基督徒时，这可不是什么好兆头。特朗普将参加由保守派基督教领袖在华盛顿特区组织的为期一周的公开读经活动。来源：纽约时报 https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2045615778452459918/photo/1 - Clash Report 推文

text: Israel is preparing for a renewed phase of intense fighting across Gaza at the start of next month. This follows Hamas’s refusal to disarm, prompting Israeli officials to plan an escalation, with early next month set as the latest deadline. Source: Israeli Channel 14
text_zh: 以色列正准备在下月初开始在加沙进行新一轮激烈的战斗。此前哈马斯拒绝解除武装，促使以色列官员计划升级行动，并将下月初定为最后期限。来源：以色列第14频道

text: OSINTdefender Iranians officials are lowering expectations of this week’s talks in Islamabad and appear suspicious that President Trump’s talk of a deal could be cover for a U.S. surprise attack, according to Axios. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据Axios报道，伊朗官员降低了对本周伊斯兰堡会谈的预期，并怀疑特朗普总统关于达成协议的言论可能是美国发动突然袭击的掩护。推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what's on board! 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：今天，一艘名为TOUSKA的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海军封锁，但结果对他们来说并不好。美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS SPRUANCE）导弹驱逐舰在阿曼湾拦截了TOUSKA号，并向其发出了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，因此我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。TOUSKA号因其过往的非法活动记录而受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，正在查看船上装载了什么！ 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar: The IDF has withdrew from the outskirts of Rshaf and Wadi Al-Ayoun towards the town of Dibl, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 《消息报》（Al-Akhbar）：以色列国防军已从黎巴嫩南部拉沙夫（Rshaf）和瓦迪阿永（Wadi Al-Ayoun）郊区撤退至迪布尔（Dibl）镇。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says a U.S. Navy destroyer intercepted an Iranian-flagged cargo ship: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Maritime tracking data shows the last recorded location of the Iranian flagged cargo ship Touska after it was boarded by U.S. Marines. The container carrier seems to have attempted to reach the Iranian waters, it then changed course, reduced speed and was declared "not under control" around here: 24° 41N 61° 9E @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普称一艘美国海军驱逐舰拦截了一艘伊朗籍货船：今天，一艘名为TOUSKA的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海军封锁……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 海事追踪数据显示了伊朗籍货船Touska在被美国海军陆战队登船后的最后记录位置。这艘集装箱货轮似乎曾试图驶向伊朗水域，随后改变航向、减速，并在该位置被宣布为“失控”：北纬24°41'，东经61°9' @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 BREAKING! Trump took to social media to personally announce that the USS Spruance fired on and disabled the Iranian-flagged cargo vessel Touska in the Gulf of Oman after it allegedly attempted to pass through Washington's naval blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 突发！特朗普在社交媒体上亲自宣布，美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS Spruance）驱逐舰在阿曼湾向一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的货船“图斯卡”号（Touska）开火并使其瘫痪，此前该船涉嫌试图强行通过华盛顿的海上封锁线。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡ 🇮🇷 US forces opened fire on Iranian commercial vessel and forced it to return towards Iranian territorial waters. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡ 🇮🇷 美国军队向一艘伊朗商船开火，并迫使其返回伊朗领海。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: BREAKING: Trump: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!
text_zh: 突发：特朗普：今天，一艘名为“图斯卡”号（TOUSKA）的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海上封锁，但他们的下场并不好。美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS SPRUANCE）导弹驱逐舰在阿曼湾拦截了“图斯卡”号，并向其发出了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，因此我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。“图斯卡”号因其过往的非法活动记录而受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，正在检查船上装载的物品！

text: Thank you for your participation
text_zh: 感谢您的参与

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : It’s being reported agents are now resorting to “creative measures” to get Kash Patel to show up for work… https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045585919026057508/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：据报道，特工们现在正采取“创造性手段”让卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）去上班…… https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045585919026057508/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : D.C. police were set to arrest Rep. Cory Mills (R-FL) after an assault allegation, but a lieutenant halted it when the accuser changed her story after speaking with him. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045699779728982133/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：华盛顿特区警方原定在接到袭击指控后逮捕众议员科里·米尔斯（Cory Mills，共和党，佛罗里达州），但一名中尉在指控者与他交谈后改变了说法时叫停了逮捕行动。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045699779728982133/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Kash Patel is trying to keep his job by telling Trump what he wants to hear. Q: Do you have anything to tell us about the 2020 election being rigged against President Trump? Kash Patel: Absolutely. I am never going to let this go. They tried to rig the entire system. We are going to be making arrests https://x.com/atrupar/status/2045874479994171673/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 卡什·帕特尔试图通过告诉特朗普他想听的话来保住自己的工作。问：关于2020年大选针对特朗普总统被操纵一事，你有什么要告诉我们的吗？卡什·帕特尔：当然。我永远不会放过这件事。他们试图操纵整个系统。我们将进行逮捕 https://x.com/atrupar/status/2045874479994171673/video/1 - 反特朗普共和党人推文

text: Open Source Intel Senator Graham: Mr. President: take control of the Strait of Hormuz and keep the blockade in place. Then you will truly have all the cards. Lindsey Graham: The brilliant blockade is crushing the Iranian economy. The IRGC attack on international shipping is a sign of desperation. Mr. President: take control of the Strait of Hormuz and keep the blockade in place. Then you will truly have all the cards. As to enrichment, if you thought it would be a bad idea to recognize that al Qaeda has a right to enrich even with a moratorium, you’d be right. The Iranian regime and al Qaeda are no different. They have the same goals. This terrorist regime with American blood on its hands has no right to enrich, period. They cheat and lie. No JCPOA-like deal on President Trump’s watch. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 格雷厄姆参议员：总统先生：控制霍尔木兹海峡并保持封锁。这样你就真正掌握了所有筹码。林赛·格雷厄姆：这一出色的封锁正在摧毁伊朗经济。伊斯兰革命卫队对国际航运的攻击是绝望的迹象。总统先生：控制霍尔木兹海峡并保持封锁。这样你就真正掌握了所有筹码。关于浓缩铀，如果你认为承认基地组织即使在暂停期也有权进行浓缩是一个坏主意，那你是对的。伊朗政权和基地组织没有什么不同。他们有相同的目标。这个手上沾满美国人鲜血的恐怖政权没有权利进行浓缩，一点也没有。他们欺骗和撒谎。在特朗普总统任内，绝不会有类似伊核协议（JCPOA）的交易。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Channel 14 reports that after Hamas rejected calls to disarm and demilitarize Gaza, Israel is gearing up to restart heavy combat operations in the Strip. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045944845659742358/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 第14频道报道称，在哈马斯拒绝解除武装和加沙非军事化的呼吁后，以色列正准备在加沙地带重启大规模作战行动。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045944845659742358/photo/1 推文

text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫：向伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬传达了与沙特阿拉伯、卡塔尔和土耳其领导人最新讨论的观点。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045944545964101700/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The White House declared a travel and photo lid at 3:00pm ET, according to the press pool. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据媒体团消息，白宫于美东时间下午3:00宣布停止发布行程和照片。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Semi-official Iranian media Mehr claims that the U.S. Navy fired upon a commercial Iranian ship in the area of the Oman Sea, forcing it to retreat to Iranian waters. U.S. Navy vessels were forced to retreat from the area after IRGC vessels were mobilized to the area following the incident. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗半官方媒体迈赫尔通讯社（Mehr）声称，美国海军在阿曼海地区向一艘伊朗商船开火，迫使其撤回伊朗水域。在事件发生后，随着伊斯兰革命卫队舰艇被调动到该地区，美国海军舰艇被迫撤离。推文

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Department of the Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has issued a general license for Russian crude oil until May 16th, 2026 effectively pausing all sanctions on Russian related crude oil sales. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045944056484601908/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国财政部外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）已发布针对俄罗斯原油的通用许可证，有效期至2026年5月16日，实际上暂停了所有针对俄罗斯相关原油销售的制裁。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045944056484601908/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Russian monitoring channels report a massive drone attack on occupied Crimea right now with explosions in Sevastopol and mobile internet down. Russian sources say up to fifty units are flying toward Crimea. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045942924601364862/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯监测频道报道称，被占领的克里米亚目前正遭受大规模无人机袭击，塞瓦斯托波尔发生爆炸，移动互联网中断。俄罗斯消息人士称，有多达50架无人机正飞往克里米亚。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045942924601364862/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 According to Axios, Iranian officials suspect the United States could launch a strike as early as Tuesday night, even before the ceasefire deadline expires. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045941635314237460/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇮🇷 据Axios报道，伊朗官员怀疑美国最早可能在周二晚上发动袭击，甚至在停火期限到期之前。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045941635314237460/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Iranian state news agency Tasnim has posted a lengthy statement to X describing what Iran sees as continued U.S. preparations to continue the war while publicly stating they are willing to negotiate. The statement goes on to say that Iran is prepared to "abandon restraints" shown in the first phase of the war to unleash "unforgettable hellish hours right from the outset of renewed conflict with America and Israel" while explicitly stating that the Bab al Mandeb Strait, Saudi Aramco facilities, the port of Yanbu in Saudi Arabia, and the city of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates will all enter the conflict. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗国家通讯社塔斯尼姆（Tasnim）在X上发布了一份长篇声明，描述了伊朗所认为的美国在公开声称愿意谈判的同时，继续为战争做准备的行为。声明接着说，伊朗准备“放弃”在战争第一阶段表现出的“克制”，以释放“从与美国和以色列重新冲突开始时就令人难忘的地狱时刻”，同时明确指出曼德海峡、沙特阿美设施、沙特阿拉伯延布港和阿拉伯联合酋长国富查伊拉市都将卷入冲突。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian state media: Iran "considers the scenario of war more likely than the continuation of negotiations" and claims full preparedness. Tasnim. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗国家媒体：伊朗“认为战争的可能性比继续谈判更大”，并声称已做好充分准备。塔斯尼姆通讯社。推文

text: Open Source Intel The British military has raised its top alert level for the Strait of Hormuz and the Persian Gulf, calling conditions “critical.” UKMTO reported heavy naval activity and warned of a high risk of attack or miscalculation as Iran tightens transit rules and U.S. forces enforce a blockade. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 英国军方已将霍尔木兹海峡和波斯湾的警戒级别提高到最高，称局势“危急”。英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）报告称海军活动频繁，并警告称，随着伊朗收紧过境规则和美军加强封锁，发生攻击或误判的风险很高。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says a U.S. Navy destroyer intercepted an Iranian-flagged cargo ship: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
